## Decision
REFINE

## Justification
While the underlying hypothesis regarding the conversation-action gap in agentic LLMs remains sound and important, the experimental execution is fundamentally flawed and must be heavily re-tuned. The minimum quality criteria for proceeding have not been met: the analysis quality rating is a critically low 2/10 (below the ≥4/10 threshold), and ablation integrity has completely failed due to identical outputs across different experimental conditions.
